title: Star War the Third Gathers: The Backstroke of the West
original_title: Star War the Third Gathers: The Backstroke of the West
overview: Star War The Third Gathers: The Backstroke of the West (often referred to as Star War Episode: The Backstroke of the West or shortened to Backstroke of the West) is a comedic bootleg of Star Wars Episode III: Revenge of the Sith, where all dialogue was dubbed over by a poorly translated substitute (English to Simplified Chinese back to English, likely through Google Translate or similar).
